# Dispatch

> Dispatch is a done-for-you AI appointment-setting and lead-response agency. We answer every inquiry a business receives within seconds — by SMS, WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, or website forms — qualify the lead in conversation, and book the appointment straight into the business's calendar. A real person oversees every account. Guarantee: more booked, showed-up appointments in 30 days, or we work for free.

Key facts:
- Instant AI response to every inquiry, 24/7, with real human oversight on every account
- Runs natively on GoHighLevel; connects to other systems through webhooks and APIs
- All sending numbers are A2P 10DLC registered; no cold texting, no bought lists, no personal WhatsApp/iMessage automation
- Serves local service businesses: martial arts & dance studios, med spas & aesthetics, chiropractors & massage, auto detailing, cabinets & kitchen remodeling, and marketing agencies (white-label)
- Plans: Starter $397/mo, Growth $697/mo, agency white-label and enterprise tiers available
